/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -ffast-math -march=native -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/engine-sim-cli.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o engine-sim-cli  lib/libengine-sim.a lib/libengine-sim-script-interpreter.a lib/libsimple-2d-constraint-solver.a -framework AudioToolbox -framework CoreFoundation -framework Accelerate lib/libcsv-io.a lib/libpiranha.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.a
